sections.title: Welcome to Prime College
sections.content: Prime College is a leading provider of professional qualifications in the UK. We offer a wide range of nationally and internationally recognised qualifications in Business, Management, and Health & Social Care. Our courses are designed to help you advance your career and achieve your professional goals.

sections.headline: We help individuals succeed in their careers by developing knowledge, skills and professional behaviours.
paragraphs: The Prime College (TPC) offers comprehensive training programs tailored to various industries. We achieve this by partnering with industry experts and employers to develop a curriculum that aligns with the latest industry standards and practices.

TPC regularly reviews and updates its curriculum to reflect industry advancements, assessment of trainers' qualifications and teaching methods, and monitoring learners' progress and feedback. We also maintain close relationships with awarding bodies to ensure that our programs remain relevant and responsive to the evolving needs of the job market. Our organisation stands out in the market due to our commitment to innovation, flexibility, and inclusivity.

sections.title: Why Choose Us
sections.content:
We are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality, professionalism, and employee wellbeing through rigorous quality assurance processes and a dedicated mental health first-aider.

We provide live teaching sessions and follow up meetings with your dedicated tutor who will support you throughout your course. Anytime you need to reach out to your tutor for more information or guidance, this can be done through any communication method available such as: email, phone calls or Teams.

items.title: What we do
items.description: We specialise in one-on-one or group sessions.

items.title: How we do it
items.description: We provide teaching experts to develop programs that align with the industry standards.

items.title: Who is it for
items.description: Any person that is 18 and over and wishes to improve their CPD and employment prospects.

sections.title: Prime College's Delivery Standard
sections.content: Through ISO9001 and Investors In People, our teaching model means we deliver qualifications that ensure we maintain a high standard of employer and learner satisfaction.

items.title: Training Courses
items.description: From Level 1 up to Level 7, for learners that are starting their career or want to progress further into a leadership masters degree level.

items.title: Different Countries
items.description: Courses are delivered internationally, and also recognised internationally with accredited certification.

items.title: Completion Rate
items.description: To commit to every learner achieving their qualification.

sections.title: Start Your Journey Today
sections.content: Whether you are looking to start a new career, advance in your current role, or gain specialist knowledge, Prime College has a qualification for you. Contact us today to discuss your options.
